feedback_items.current_state: All 20 regular tiles generated at 512×512px or 1024×1024px source. Tile spec requires 128×128px game canvas (or 2x at 256×256px for atlas)
feedback_items.requested_action: Re-export all 20 regular tile PNGs at 128×128px canvas (or 256×256px 2x), centered, with 8px transparent bleed zone, preserving subject. Do not regenerate artwork — this is a re-export/resize operation.

feedback_items.current_state: tile_starfish, tile_hermit_crab, and tile_lanternfish contain visible generated measurement labels or guide text inside the artwork
feedback_items.requested_action: Regenerate these 3 tiles with explicit negative prompt: 'no measurement guides, no text labels, no UI annotations, no dimension markers, no size labels, no bleed marks'. Keep all other generation parameters identical.

feedback_items.current_state: tile_tuna, tile_lanternfish, tile_flying_fish, tile_dolphin, tile_crab read more saturated than ch1 s0 target (8-15% saturation, 42-48% brightness)
feedback_items.requested_action: Apply palette desaturation correction to s0 target on these 5 tiles after dimension re-export. If palette correction produces unsatisfactory results, regenerate with 'muted desaturated watercolor, 8-15% color saturation, ch1 before-repair palette, no vivid colors' positive prompt addition.

feedback_items.current_state: All 5 special tile frame_01 sources are 512×512px. Mechanic markers are visually correct and distinct — only dimension fails.
feedback_items.requested_action: Re-export all 5 special block frame_01 PNGs at 128×128px canvas. Preserve the mechanic markers (concentric rings / chain links / directional arrow / bidirectional arrows / sequential dots). Artwork does not need regeneration.

feedback_items.current_state: char_ritsu changes face shape, hair shape, age read, and costume details across 5 emotions. char_umeko changes age, headwear, face proportions, and costume details across 5 emotions.
feedback_items.requested_action: Regenerate all 5 ritsu expressions and all 5 umeko expressions using locked character reference: (ritsu) 'young adult Japanese male, slightly disheveled dark hair, rolled-sleeve light blue-grey dress shirt, relaxed island-casual posture, chibi 1:1.5 head-body ratio, same face proportions across ALL variants'; (umeko) 'mature Japanese woman, bamboo green #7DBE77 pottery apron, practical hair bun, a few loose strands, clay-stained hands, chibi 1:1.5 ratio, same face proportions across ALL variants'. Add 'no text, no labels' to negative prompt.

feedback_items.current_state: react_jump for ritsu, kenzo, and gicho reads as ordinary surprise or neutral bust rather than energetic full-body reaction pose
feedback_items.requested_action: Regenerate react_jump for these 3 characters with: 'energetic jumping reaction pose, raised shoulders, arms up or spread, wide eyes, open mouth, full-body energy visible even in bust crop, dynamic pose'. Lock identity (hair, clothing, signature color). Note: ritsu also needs FB-005 regeneration — combine into single regeneration pass.

feedback_items.requested_action: Regenerate affected expressions with negative prompt addition: 'no text, no captions, no labels, no color codes, no hex codes, no punctuation overlays, no character name, no Japanese text, no subtitle, no watermark'. Note: char_umeko assets also covered by FB-005 — combine. Affected: char_hinata_expr_react_jump, char_umeko_expr_default/thinking/surprised (combine with FB-005), char_natsuka_expr_surprised, char_fuyuko_expr_surprised/react_jump, char_gicho_expr_default/surprised.

feedback_items.requested_action: Regenerate from Hinata reference identity: 'young adult Japanese woman, sakura pink #F0C4C4 clothing accent, brown hair tied back practical windswept, notebook carried or implied, graceful posture, portrait crop showing face and shoulders, happy smiling expression, chibi proportions, hand-drawn watercolor, 1024x1024px'. feedback_items.requested_action: Regenerate both portraits at 1024×1024px. char_hinata_portrait_happy: cover also in FB-008. char_fuyuko_portrait_react_jump: 'elderly Japanese woman, night blue kimono-style top #2A4060, neat upswept white-grey hair, react_jump excited expression, portrait crop face and shoulders, neutral or gradient background, no scene background, no text, hand-drawn watercolor, 1024x1024px'.

feedback_items.current_state: All 15 gicho frames change body size, face design, crop, posture, stripe pattern, and collar rendering across adjacent frames and animation sets
feedback_items.requested_action: Rebuild all 15 frames from one locked model sheet: 'orange tabby cat, sitting upright, round body, dark navy #2A3650 collar, cat ears, cat face, consistent size and crop 192x192px, transparent background, hand-drawn watercolor'. Vary ONLY the intended motion elements. Recommend: generate one locked 'gicho-base.png' then use it as reference image for all 15 frame generations. See char-gicho-frame-animation-spec.json for frame-by-frame motion descriptions.

feedback_items.current_state: idle f04 is a side-facing heavier pose while f01 is front-facing seated; looping f04→f01 would produce a visible pop
feedback_items.requested_action: Covered by FB-010 full rebuild. When rebuilding idle: f01=neutral front-facing seated pose; f02=slight inhale/chest rise; f03=peak inhale/head slight tilt; f04=exhale returning close to f01 — f04 must be within ~5% position of f01. All 4 frames front-facing, same scale, same crop.
